creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Ben, thank you for taking the time to report an issue. Unfortunately, Bugzilla is only for bug reports and not general support issues.

You can obtain general support/help on our mailing lists, forums or IRC. See:

https://www.freebsd.org/community.html
https://www.freebsd.org/community/mailinglists.html

Hint: It's likely that DNS resolution is not correctly set up on the machine. I would google "freebsd" "pkg" "no address record" which appears to have lots of relevant results.
